about.title: About
about.description: Sparkixe is a project development brand founded by Numixe. We create digital products — from e-commerce to mobile and desktop apps and more — with an obsession for detail and users/clients satisfaction.

ecommerce.title: E-Commerce + SVG Configurator
ecommerce.description: Full e-commerce platform with an interactive SVG configurator enabling product customization.

cocktail.title: Shake It – Your cocktails and mocktails, right in your hand
cocktail.tagline: Create, organize and find all your cocktail and mocktail recipes. Manage your home bar, shopping list and favourites from your phone.
cocktail.description: Shake It is the app you need to never wonder again « what can I make with what's in my bar? ». You enter the ingredients you have at home and the app shows at a glance which cocktails you can make, which are one or two ingredients away, and which require a quick shopping trip. You can also create your own recipes, save them, access them on all your devices and share them.
cocktail.note: Available on the Google Play Store.
cocktail.feature_1: My bar – List your ingredients and see straight away which cocktails you can make.
cocktail.feature_2: Shopping list – Generate a list from missing ingredients for your recipes or your basket.
cocktail.feature_3: Personal recipes – Create, edit and save your cocktails and mocktails (ingredients, measures, instructions).
cocktail.feature_4: Favourites and search – Quickly find a recipe with search, categories and favourites.
cocktail.feature_5: Customization – Language, theme (light/dark), measurement system (cl, ml, oz) and home page of your choice.
cocktail.feature_6: Secure account – Your data is synced and protected; Premium upgrade available.
cocktail.download_text: Available on the Google Play Store.

desktop.title: Desktop App - Tablet
desktop.description: Tablet desktop application built with C# using WPF and .NET, designed for a smooth user experience on unstable networks.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.subtitle: General policy for the Sparkixe website.

global.intro: This site (sparkixe.com) is a portfolio and showcase website. Data collected is limited to what is strictly necessary for the site to function.
global.data: Data collected: IP address and technical data related to browsing (cookies where used for preferences). No sale of data to third parties.
global.rights: You have the right to access, rectify, erase and portability (GDPR). To exercise these rights or for any questions: contact us via the Contact page.
global.apps: Some applications or projects (e.g. Shake It) have their own detailed privacy policy, accessible from their project page or via the link below.

delete_account.title: Account deletion
delete_account.subtitle: Shake It — Sparkixe
delete_account.procedure_title: How to request deletion of your account and associated data
delete_account.procedure_in_app: In the Shake It app: open the « User settings » page and tap « Supprimer le compte » (Delete account).
delete_account.procedure_email: Or contact us by email at support_shake_it@sparkixe.com with the email address of your account and proof of account ownership (e.g. screenshot of your profile or account page). We will process your request within the timeframes set out below.
delete_account.data_deleted: When your account is deleted, the following data is removed: account data (email, display name, profile picture), personal recipes, « My Bar » content, favourites, cart, and preferences (language, theme, measurement system, home page). Technical data (logs) is deleted or anonymised within a reasonable timeframe.
delete_account.data_retained: We do not keep any personal data after deletion, except where required by law (e.g. billing, disputes) for a limited period.
delete_account.retention: Deletion requests are processed within a reasonable timeframe (within 30 days). Data is permanently erased within the necessary technical timeframes.
delete_account.back_privacy: Back to Shake It privacy policy
delete_account.back_project: Back to Shake It project page
